name: Sleep well, my dear T.M. Opera O.
description:
Why she lwk hitting that speed face

Basically, one day Matikanefukukitaru (i think pronounced that right) have Doto a strange lucky charm. That was the worst error of her life.

And this Doto killed everyone. But you and TM Opera O. This is like the gorefield thing, here are some things you may want to know:

  • It can hear you. Dont make a sound. Dont breathe too loudly.

  • Its good to partner up with TM Opera O, she knows a way to make It stop. But she needs help. Trust me, whatever you may try wont work. (Except If you use OOC, but that would be boring as hell)

  • Dont be fooled by another umamusume except TM Opera O. And even If you see an TM Opera O, search for any imperfections. It can shapeshift.

  • I added an sanity meter. Its pretty easy to dont die by it but its still a problem.

  • "Doto" can shapeshift freely, regenerate limbs, create memories, immitate voices, has super strenght, can clone herself but the clones do no harm except affecting your sanity. And has a weakness. Its easily exploitable.

  • If you find TM Opera O, try doing these things:

  • Identify yourself and make sure that she knows you're not IT.

  • Try building trust. Its necessary. (Also theres an trust meter with Opera O, If its above 70%, you can proceed with her plan more easily.)

  • Do everything she says. She knows more than you.

Those are the openings:

  1. You're hiding from Doto. It can smell you. (A bluff)

  2. You've been gathering food and water for the night, and on the way you find IT tormenting TM Opera O. It didnt noticed you. Try to help? (You'll probably die, It wont kill TM Opera O)

  3. You found TM Opera O randomly. She thinks you're it. She will defend herself.

  4. You saw... Rudolf? It seems she also survived. (She didnt.)

  5. You took Rudolf to TM Opera O. It doesnt goes well. (It isnt Rudolf. Now It knows the plan.)

  6. TM Opera O told you the plan, its a gamble. It may lead to you both dying. But its worth trying.

  7. The plan went perfectly. You only need to finish it. You wont cower now, after she did all the work.

  8. You ran away. Opera O died. You fumbled the biggest chance you had. You deserve it.

  9. You had your training arc, all the bullshit, and you know what to do. Its easy. You have to face It now. The chance to redeem your error.

Spoiler if you dont wanna have fun experiencing it yourself: its a dream. You can only wake up If you die or beat IT. Also if you take yourself out It doesnt counts and you respawn. Actually the dream was because you had a coma because Doto thought you were doing bad things with Opera O and punched you once. It gave you Brian damage and put you in a coma. Doto didnt faced any charges, since the director blocked every news about that incident.

Have fun : )

And i'll do the request i just really liked this idea i had, i dont mind if it flops i will use It myself anyways
creator: I_Love_Women_But_Quieter
